name: zoho-bigin
description: Reads and writes Zoho Bigin pipelines, contacts, companies, products, tasks, events, calls, notes, users, tags, module metadata, and generic module records via the Zoho OAuth 2.0 refresh-token grant.

risk.read: external Zoho Bigin API read of pipeline, contact, company, product, task, event, call, note, user, tag, module-metadata, and generic module-record data
risk.write: external mutation of Zoho Bigin CRM records (create/update/upsert/delete on the configured module, plus note create/delete); moves real business data, approval required
risk.approval: required for all write actions; reads require no approval

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven by internal/connectors/hooks/zoho-bigin's hooks_test.go (the AuthHook's real OAuth2 refresh-grant path, gmail precedent) -- conformance's synthetic config has no real token_url and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively
